title: hieracium tomentosum subsp. liottardii
intro: Hieracium tomentosum subsp. liottardii, also known as the woolly hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium tomentosum subsp. liottardii include its use as a diuretic and its potential to reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including its ability to treat urinary tract issues, kidney stones, and skin conditions due to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Hieracium tomentosum subsp. liottardii can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
